Issues: Low Originality: The image is a very common and simple landscape/abstract composition (sunset/sunrise), which limits its commercial uniqueness.

Minimal Detail/Complexity: While the color scheme is appealing, the lack of complex texture, focal points, or unique artistic technique means it offers limited aesthetic value beyond simple background usage.
Commercial Appeal Limitation: It lacks the intricate details or highly stylized composition often required to command high prices in the print or digital art market.
